checklist.detail: Only 2 of 5 plan-required tests have meaningful non-skipped implementations: TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip'd; TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA omits Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true; TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks omits grade assertion; TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' instead of TierGeneric — plan required TierGeneric unit.

checklist.detail: Edit is confined to internal/engine/scorer_test.go, the only file the plan called for; no production code changes, no unrelated churn.

checklist.detail: TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported) instead of TierGeneric unit as the plan explicitly requires, weakening the guard; TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks weakens the plan-required grade assertion to a weaker weighted-average check; TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA drops Grade and Unsupported assertions.
checklist.label: No test-gaming / faking

checklist.detail: No production code changes; tests compile and pass; but weakened/missing assertions leave regression gaps — unsupported-language handling and TierGeneric default injection are not fully guarded as the plan intended.
checklist.label: Safe to advance

dimensions.evidence: Only 2 of 5 plan-required tests have meaningful non-skipped implementations: TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip'd; TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA omits Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true; TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks omits grade assertion; TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' instead of TierGeneric — plan required TierGeneric unit.
Edit is confined to internal/engine/scorer_test.go, the only file the plan called for; no production code changes, no unrelated churn.

TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported) instead of TierGeneric unit as the plan explicitly requires, weakening the guard; TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks weakens the plan-required grade assertion to a weaker weighted-average check; TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA drops Grade and Unsupported assertions.

No production code changes; tests compile and pass; but weakened/missing assertions leave regression gaps — unsupported-language handling and TierGeneric default injection are not fully guarded as the plan intended.

failureReasons: Only 2 of 5 plan-required tests have meaningful non-skipped implementations (TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip'd)
TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA omits plan-required Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true assertions
TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported) instead of TierGeneric unit as plan explicitly requires, weakening the guard
TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored relies on TierGeneric nil-return shortcut rather than specifically testing the complexity<=5 branch
